APPEARANCES:
Atty. J. CRAIG CRAWFORD, Esq. of Carr McClellan P.C. (Tel: 650-342-9600) for plaintiff Stephen Ternlund, M.D. (via Zoom Videoconference);

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF STEPHEN TERNLUND's Motion For Preliminary Injunction.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed the parties to appear.
